name: Honey Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Spray cookie sheet with nonstick vegetable cooking spray.
3. Cream honey, applesauce, and margarine in a large bowl using an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Beat in egg whites one at a time, then add vanilla.
5. In a separate medium bowl, combine flour, oats, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; mix well.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the honey mixture and mix thoroughly.
7. Stir in chocolate chips and nuts (if using).
8. Heap teaspoonfuls of the mixture onto the prepared cookie sheet.
9. Place the cookie sheet above the center of the oven.
10. Bake for 12-16 minutes or until lightly browned.
11. Let cookies stand for 1 minute, then remove and place on wire racks to cool.
Makes approximately 5 dozen cookies.
